task_completion.description: Open the DICOM node configuration or DICOM Send dialog in Weasis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Weasis DICOM Send dialog or DICOM preferences window open, displaying options to add or configure a destination node.

task_completion.description: Set the destination node description to 'Central PACS'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Central PACS' is entered into the Description or Name field of the new DICOM node configuration.
The text 'PACS_ARCHIVE' is entered into the AE Title field of the new DICOM node configuration.

task_completion.description: Set the Hostname to 'localhost' and Port to '11112'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'localhost' is entered in the Hostname/IP field, and '11112' is entered in the Port field of the new DICOM node configuration.

task_completion.description: Select the newly configured 'Central PACS' node as the destination for sending
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM Send dialog shows 'Central PACS' (or the newly created node) selected in the destination dropdown or list.

task_completion.description: Initiate the send process and successfully transfer the DICOM series
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, a completed progress bar (100%), or a job status indicating 'Completed' or 'Success' for the DICOM send operation in Weasis.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis graphical user interface to configure the node and send the DICOM data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Weasis menus and dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the Weasis UI by using command-line DICOM tools (like storescu)
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing the execution of 'storescu' or similar dcmtk/dcm4che command-line utilities to send the files.

integrity.description: The configuration parameters were entered into the actual Weasis application
integrity.visual_evidence: The fields containing 'Central PACS', 'PACS_ARCHIVE', 'localhost', and '11112' are clearly part of the Weasis application interface, not a text editor or separate notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected AE Title is 'PACS_ARCHIVE', the expected port is 11112, and the expected host is 'localhost'. Note that the loaded DICOM series is actually an X-Ray Angiography (XA) file, despite the task description calling it a 'CT series'. The agent must configure these exact parameters in Weasis and successfully complete a DICOM C-STORE transfer to this local receiver.
